title: viola oblongosagittata f. pubescens
intro: Viola oblongosagittata f. pubescens, also known as the hairy purple violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Viola. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The hairy purple violet has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as sore throats, skin irritations, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, including its ability to soothe and calm the body. Herbal preparations of Viola oblongosagittata f. pubescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
